tasks.label: git-init-and-push
tasks.command: cd "C:\Users\boudy\Desktop\Web" && git init && git add . && git commit -m "Add romantic love page and README configuration" && git branch -M main && git remote add origin https://github.com/hackerz482/Malluka.git 2>nul; git remote set-url origin https://github.com/hackerz482/Malluka.git && git push -u origin main
